items.title: [Full Smile] GBP Posting
items.note: Investigate and implement a regular Google Business Profile posting cadence to improve Google Maps ranking. Surfaced 7/15 while Sohib used Full Smile as a case study pitching a new prospect (Citrus Smiles). No existing item on any of the 3 boards.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Investigate and implement a regular Google Business Profile posting cadence for Full Smile Dental.
  • Goal is to improve Google Maps ranking. Full Smile organic SEO has already grown from 0 to 100+ ranking keywords, GBP posting is the next lever.
  • Sohib flagged this while using Full Smile as a case study in a prospect pitch (Citrus Smiles), so there is outside visibility on this result now.

@Muhammad Hashir Faiz @Zayan Faiz
